title: The Cave Girl
writer: Guy Bolton, Katherine Hilliker, George Middleton
actors: Teddie Gerard, Charles Meredith, Wilton Taylor
plot: Margot Sperry, who keeps house for her guardian, a professor who wants to revert to primitive modes of living, finds it difficult to find food in the winter wilderness and resorts to pilfering from the Bates's winter camp. Divvy, ...
